formulaTemplates.name: VRE-PARFE CO2 Offset — Equation 1
formulaTemplates.description: Carbon offset quantity derived from verified renewable energy generation. measurementValue is the accumulated kWh from hardware-attested TELEMETRY records. gef is the Grid Emission Factor for the licensee's jurisdiction (Mauritius baseline: 0.9908 kgCO₂e/kWh), stored in the LICENSE_GRANT HCS record at production.

formulaTemplates.name: VRE-PARFE Physics Gate — Equation 2
formulaTemplates.description: Maximum permissible kWh per single sensor reading, derived from the site's installed generation capacity. Any TELEMETRY record with kwh > physicsLimitKwh is rejected by the edge notary before HCS submission. This is a mandatory fraud-prevention gate — not an optional check. capacityMW is stored in the GATEWAY_DEPLOY HCS record set by the issuing authority at gateway commissioning.

formulaTemplates.name: VRE-PARFE REC Mint Threshold — Equation 3
formulaTemplates.description: Number of REC tokens minted when accumulated verified kWh crosses the mint threshold. MINT_THRESHOLD_KWH is 100 kWh for testnet; at production this is stored per-licensee in the LICENSE_GRANT HCS record. Each REC represents 100 kWh of verified renewable generation.
